calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Judgment Of Restitution And Money Owed Pursuant Settlement (Ccp 664.6)
Off Calendar Mar-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RITA LAU'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF RESTITUTION AND MONEY OWED PURSUANT (to) SETTLEMENT (CCP SECTION 664.6).
APPEARANCES: Estella Ortega & Erik Saldana, 933-2249 defts & opposing parties in propria persona (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of their intent to appear at the hearing); no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion Granted. Request for $1,225 reasonable attorney's fees and $40 costs granted. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW/PB) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5759

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jphn Brian McCauley for Rita Lau, who is present
Katie Spielman for Estella Ortega, who is present

Settlement Conference Held. Case settled. Parties enter into a settlement agreement, which is not filed with this court. settlement terms contained in the agreement for premises located at 1601 Sacramento Street, #1, San Francisco, CA

Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, Clerk melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
